name: Superior Credit
description_short: Atlanta-based credit repair company that disputes inaccurate items and adds tradelines to improve credit scores for residents seeking mortgage, auto, or debt relief.
description_long:
Superior Credit Repair operates as a credit repair service based in Atlanta, Georgia, targeting consumers who face obstacles in obtaining mortgages, auto loans, or achieving debt freedom due to negative credit items. The company positions itself as a local service provider specializing in credit restoration within the Atlanta market.

The company offers credit repair through dispute processes targeting inaccurate or unverified negative items on credit reports, including collections, late payments, charge-offs, bankruptcies, judgments, tax liens, repossessions, inquiries, foreclosures, and garnishments. They also advertise tradeline addition services and free credit counseling. Their stated approach includes credit score boosting, debt consolidation, and credit adjustment programs.

Superior Credit Repair emphasizes local service and a mission-driven approach to providing "second chances" at financial independence. They highlight free credit counseling as part of their service offering and operate standard business hours (Monday-Friday, 9am-5pm). The company uses repetitive marketing messaging focused on life goals like homeownership and debt elimination as motivators for consumers to seek their services.

Limited third-party verification is available—only a BBB profile reference appears in provided data. The website lacks detailed pricing information, service timelines, or transparent success metrics. No information about licensing, accreditation, or specific dispute methodologies is disclosed. The heavy focus on tradeline services alongside dispute work raises questions about primary business model, as tradelines exist in a legally gray area and are sometimes used as predatory upsells in credit repair.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers free credit counseling and consultations (stated on website)
Targets specific negative items: collections, charge-offs, bankruptcies, tax liens, foreclosures, garnishments
Local Atlanta-based company with established business hours
Addresses multiple financial goals: mortgage qualification, auto purchase, debt elimination
Markets debt consolidation and credit adjustment services alongside dispute work
Emphasizes accessibility with toll-free phone number (1-888-715-2400)
cons: No transparent pricing, service costs, or payment terms disclosed on website
No verifiable track record, success rates, or consumer testimonials actually displayed (testimonials page exists but content not provided)
Heavily emphasizes tradeline services, which are legally contentious and often used as predatory upsells in credit repair
Limited third-party verification—only BBB profile referenced; no ratings, complaints data, or licensing information provided
Makes broad promises ('no financial obstacles we cannot address') without specific timelines or guarantees
best_for: Atlanta-area residents with collections, charge-offs, or tax liens seeking dispute-based credit repair
Consumers preparing to apply for mortgages or auto loans and needing credit score improvement
Individuals wanting local service and phone-based customer interaction over digital-only platforms
diagnosis: Superior Credit Repair is best suited for Atlanta-area consumers who want local credit repair service and have specific negative items (collections, charge-offs, judgments) they believe are inaccurate or unverified. However, the lack of transparent pricing, disclosed success metrics, heavy reliance on tradeline services, and minimal third-party verification create significant risk—consumers should verify BBB standing and request detailed service agreements before engaging.
services: Credit dispute services for inaccurate or unverified negative items
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3343 Peachtree Rd NE Suite 145, Atlanta, GA 30326
